description: scaffold a new skill dir from template (SKILL.md + agents/openai.yaml + optional resource dirs)
rules: local-only: creates files under OUTPUT_PATH/SKILL_NAME, no remote or live service
skill name normalized to hyphen-case; fails if the target dir already exists
agents/openai.yaml generated deterministically from the vendored generate_openai_yaml.py sibling
usage: Set SKILL_NAME (hyphen-case) and OUTPUT_PATH (parent dir). Optional RESOURCES (comma list: scripts,references,assets). Output: init.out.
limitation: Scaffolding only — does not edit SKILL.md content. Fails if OUTPUT_PATH/SKILL_NAME already exists. Requires python3 + PyYAML for the agents/openai.yaml step.
